title: Playwright dev dependency + WebView2 CDP driver scaffold
goal: Add Playwright as a dev dependency in app/package.json and scaffold the WebView2-via-CDP driver per spec §6.4.1 (AC-VISUAL-DEBUGGER-IMPL). The driver attaches to the random remote-debugging-port published by MT-018 and exposes a typed test API the capture-matrix scenarios (MT-023) and console-error scan (MT-022) call into.
expected_diff_shape: app/package.json + app/pnpm-lock.yaml dev-dep additions (@playwright/test, playwright); new test scaffold under tests/visual/webview2_cdp_driver.ts; sample fixture test exercising one screenshot.
unblock_conditions: MT-018 CDP wiring ships so the random remote-debugging-port is discoverable.
implementation_notes: Per spec §6.4.1 + research note RW-4. app/package.json: add `"@playwright/test": "^1.46.0"` and `"playwright": "^1.46.0"` to devDependencies. Run `pnpm install` to regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml (the MT must check in the resulting lockfile). webview2_cdp_driver.ts: implements `class WebView2CdpDriver { async connect(handshakeProcess: ChildProcess): Promise<Page>; async disconnect(): Promise<void>; }`. connect(): (1) queries the Handshake process via Tauri IPC `kernel.visual_debug.port()` to discover the random port; (2) calls `await chromium.connectOverCDP(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}`)`; (3) returns the first Page (the main WebView2 page). Per AC-VISUAL-DEBUGGER-IMPL the driver never modifies UI state outside test scope — the test API enforces this by wrapping any `page.evaluate` calls behind a `readOnly()` namespace that rejects writes. sample_screenshot.spec.ts: minimal test that connects, takes a screenshot via Playwright's `page.screenshot()`, asserts the resulting buffer is non-empty PNG bytes. Playwright config (playwright.config.ts): timeout 30s per test, `projects` array with one project for now (matrix expansion lands in MT-023). The MT also adds a justfile recipe `visual-test` that runs `pnpm --filter app exec playwright test`. NOTE: pnpm-lock.yaml diff will be large; that's expected.
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test tests/visual/sample_screenshot.spec.ts
risk_if_missed: Without Playwright + CDP driver, the visual debugger has no test framework; HBR-VIS-001 evidence_kind=gui_drive_with_screenshot_capture cannot be produced.
validator_focus: pnpm-lock.yaml is committed and `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` passes; the driver's readOnly() wrapper rejects writes; the sample test produces a non-empty PNG.

minimum_controls: Playwright dev-dep version is pinned (no caret-only) for reproducibility.
readOnly() wrapper enforces no UI mutation from test scope.
pnpm-lock.yaml committed in same MT to ensure frozen-lockfile reproducibility.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: @playwright/test ^1.60.0 + playwright ^1.60.0 declared in app/package.json; pnpm-lock.yaml present; tests/visual/webview2_cdp_driver.ts implements WebView2CdpDriver with chromium.connectOverCDP, readOnly() wrapper that rejects DOM mutations / synthetic interactions / network side effects, isPngBuffer signature check, and a Tauri IPC verification path; tests/visual/sample_screenshot.spec.ts exercises the driver and proves PNG bytes return; app/playwright.config.ts defines a three-project visual matrix with capture_matrix_entry metadata.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: @playwright/test ^1.60.0 + playwright ^1.60.0 declared in app/package.json; pnpm-lock.yaml present; tests/visual/webview2_cdp_driver.ts implements WebView2CdpDriver with chromium.connectOverCDP, readOnly() wrapper that rejects DOM mutations / synthetic interactions / network side effects, isPngBuffer signature check, and a Tauri IPC verification path; tests/visual/sample_screenshot.spec.ts exercises the driver and proves PNG bytes return; app/playwright.config.ts defines a three-project visual matrix with capture_matrix_entry metadata.
